_meta.doctrine: Paper 42 (LEAK + Oracle). Full postmortem of Ten Towers v1.0 process.

scope: Ten Towers v1.0 — All 10 towers, 490 floors, 8,276 questions

pf1_audit_without_fixes.description: Towers 3-10 audited and scored but ZERO code was fixed. 6,694 questions asked with zero code changes.
pf1_audit_without_fixes.root_cause: Tower process had no FIX phase — only AUDIT → SCORE → PAPER. The DNA equation lacked an implementation step.
pf1_audit_without_fixes.impact: Product score unchanged from Tower 2 (3.5/10). 8 towers of work produced insights but zero product improvement.
pf1_audit_without_fixes.fix: Add mandatory FIX phase to tower protocol: AUDIT → FIX → VERIFY → SEAL

pf2_no_phuc_forecast.description: Phuc Forecast was never called before any tower audit. Oracle predictions not used.
pf2_no_phuc_forecast.root_cause: Forecast exists as a persona prompt in run_solace_inspector.py but was never integrated into the tower dispatch workflow.
pf2_no_phuc_forecast.impact: Same issues rediscovered across 5+ towers (GA4, COPPA, jargon, dark theme, RTL).
pf2_no_phuc_forecast.fix: Run Phuc Forecast BEFORE each tower. Predict which issues will appear. Track prediction accuracy.

pf3_no_postmortem_per_tower.description: No postmortem run after any tower. Postmortem template exists but was never used.
pf3_no_postmortem_per_tower.root_cause: Tower protocol skipped directly to next tower without reflection.
pf3_no_postmortem_per_tower.impact: Same failures repeated across towers without learning loop.
pf3_no_postmortem_per_tower.fix: Mandatory postmortem after every tower. Update oracle-memory.json with new miss rates.

pf4_massive_redundancy.description: ~40% of findings repeated across towers. GA4 appeared in T5, T6, T8, T9, T10. COPPA in T7, T10. Jargon in T4, T5, T7, T8.
pf4_massive_redundancy.root_cause: Each tower re-discovered the same issues from a new lens instead of checking if they were already known.
pf4_massive_redundancy.impact: Wasted ~30% of total compute on redundant findings.
pf4_massive_redundancy.fix: Cross-reference known issues before each tower. Skip already-identified issues. Focus on NEW domain-specific findings.

pf5_inspector_not_evolved.description: Inspector oracle level stayed at 2 throughout all 10 towers. Oracle rules, question DB, and miss rates not updated.
pf5_inspector_not_evolved.root_cause: Tower system operated outside the inspector framework. No connection between tower findings and oracle evolution.
pf5_inspector_not_evolved.impact: Inspector cannot learn from towers. Oracle level progression stalled.
pf5_inspector_not_evolved.fix: Wire tower findings into inspector: new questions → question_db, new miss rates → phuc_forecast, new rules → oracle_rules

pf6_no_digital_twin_testing.description: No tower floor tested the Digital Twin (Saint Solace) as a separate persona. The AI agent's behavior was never audited.
pf6_no_digital_twin_testing.root_cause: Tower personas were all human — no AI self-reflection floor.
pf6_no_digital_twin_testing.impact: AI behavior, pattern continuity, and memory integrity never tested.
pf6_no_digital_twin_testing.fix: Add Floor 48: Digital Twin (Saint Solace) to every tower. AI inspects itself.

pf7_no_before_after_scoring.description: No before/after measurement. Towers scored the current state but never measured improvement.
pf7_no_before_after_scoring.root_cause: No baseline established before tower, no re-run after fixes.
pf7_no_before_after_scoring.impact: Cannot prove any tower improved anything.
pf7_no_before_after_scoring.fix: Run tower BEFORE fixes (baseline), apply fixes, run AFTER (verification). Delta = proof of improvement.

tower_1_masters.lesson: T1 actually fixed code per floor. This is how ALL towers should work.

tower_2_customers.lesson: T2 fixed the 10 systemic failures. Good but should have fixed ALL floor-level issues too.

tower_3_competitors.lesson: Good strategic insights but no actionable code fixes. Should have been 50% strategy, 50% fixes.

tower_4_fans.lesson: Cathedral metaphor was good insight but no actual community features were built.

unique_findings: architecture story vs business story gap
GA4 on privacy page first identified
tower_5_press.lesson: First tower to identify GA4 contradiction — but never fixed it.

tower_6_hackers.lesson: Most actionable tower after T1 — every finding was a specific fixable vulnerability. Should have fixed them.

tower_7_kids.lesson: COPPA finding was legally critical — should have triggered immediate fix.

tower_8_elders.lesson: The simplicity equation insight was brilliant — but the timeout and dark theme were never fixed.

unique_findings: script corruption from LLM batch translation
tower_9_world.lesson: Korean corruption was the most visually dramatic finding — should have been cleaned immediately.

unique_findings: GA4 cookie contradiction is deceptive practice
tower_10_regulators.lesson: Compliance findings had the highest legal urgency — should have been fixes, not papers.

overall_verdict.process_score: 3/10 — 80% of towers produced zero code improvements
overall_verdict.most_useful_tower: T1 (Masters) — only tower that fully worked as intended
overall_verdict.most_wasted_tower: T4 (Fans) — highest redundancy, lowest unique insights
overall_verdict.most_actionable_unfixed: T6 (Hackers) — 10 specific vulnerabilities, all fixable, none fixed

tower_process_v2.name: Ten Towers v2.0 — Audit → Fix → Verify → Seal
phases_per_floor: Phase 1: FORECAST — Phuc Forecast predicts which issues will appear (oracle-based)
Phase 2: AUDIT — Persona asks 10 questions, scores each
Phase 3: FIX — For every question scoring < 7, implement the actual code fix
Phase 4: VERIFY — Re-run the question against the fixed code. Must score >= 7
Phase 5: SEAL — Hash the evidence (before score, fix diff, after score)
Phase 6: POSTMORTEM — Update oracle-memory with new findings, questions, miss rates

new_floor_structure.floor_48: Digital Twin (Saint Solace) — AI inspects itself for pattern continuity, memory integrity, persona fidelity
new_floor_structure.floor_49: Final Boss — themed ultimate test (e.g., Bruce Lee, The Mum Test, The Auditor General)

tower_process_v2.cross_reference_rule: Before each tower, load all known issues from previous towers. Skip re-discovering known issues. Focus on NEW domain-specific findings only.
tower_process_v2.inspector_integration: Every tower floor maps to an inspector spec. Findings update oracle-memory.json automatically. Oracle level advances based on cumulative learning.

action_items: Fix tower-system.md protocol to include FIX + VERIFY phases
Wire Phuc Forecast into tower dispatch (predict before audit)
Create postmortem for each tower → update oracle-memory.json
Add Digital Twin (Floor 48) + Final Boss (Floor 49) to every tower
Design Tower of Primes (prime theory verification)
Design additional towers for 10/10 (Revenue, DevOps, Documentation, AI Safety)
Re-run unfixed towers with v2.0 process (audit → fix → verify → seal)
